channel.title: build on ilo
channel.description: Recent content in build on ilo

item.title: Building ilo
item.description: ilo requires a certain set of software installed on your system in order to be built. Prerequisites git for version control minisign to sign the waiver as a contributor gpg to sign your the commit which adds the waiver Manual Setup Java JDK to compile the code Maven to build the project hugo in order to create the website GraalVM to build a native executable ilo Setup ilo to open the reproducible build environment for ilo itself One of the runtimes that ilo shell supports.
